Programming languages

‚Ä¢ Choosing the right programming language for backend development is one of the most important decisions in software development.

‚Ä¢ Among the most popular choices are Java, Node.js, and Python.

‚Ä¢ Although all three can build powerful applications.

Their architectures and execution models are very different.

Java Architecture

Java follows the principle "Write Once, Run Anywhere (WORA)."
